ops.text:
E23 PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (cap $15).

GOAL: Mine snapshot refined_pairs for recurring, mechanically-checkable correction patterns with high cross-session/cross-repo support. Compile >=10 CANDIDATE capt-hook rules (trigger condition [tool/content pattern] + steer message citing pair ids + nudge|gate). Output = candidates file ONLY (no hook install, no writes to .claude/hooks): ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E23/out/rules.json + markdown table.

DATA: read-only snapshot /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/_base-20260719/feedback.db (immutable=1). refined_pairs view: 4126 pairs, 687 sessions, 702 origin_paths. Categories: direction 2574, wrong_approach 999, incorrect_change 261, unwanted_action 132, style_violation 93, premature 67. Fields: action (what assistant did), direction (refined steer), direction_verbatim (user's words), original_message, category, session_id, origin_path, event_id (pair id proxy: dedup_key+pair_index).

MINING METHOD: keyword/phrase frequency + manual clustering over direction_verbatim + direction + action, ranked by DISTINCT-session support (a pattern must recur across >=N distinct sessions/repos to qualify). Prefer patterns detectable from a tool-call payload (Edit/Write content regex/AST, Bash command). Map each to a capt-hook shape: PreToolUse/PostToolUse trigger + nudge (one-shot advice) or gate (stop check).

EVAL (precision): for each rule, replay its trigger regex against HELD-OUT mirror sessions via cc-transcript grep --root /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/mirrors/yasyf (460 repos; NEVER local ~/.claude). Sample fired sites (target ~8-10/rule), extract context, judge with opus: "would this rule's steer be CORRECT here (true positive) or a false alarm?". precision = correct/(sampled fired). Bootstrap CI per rule.

PRE-REGISTERED SUCCESS: >=10 rules at >=80% judged precision.

Fresh vote/judgment isolation: E8 — no shared caches. Spend tracked, judge=opus, <=$15.
RETURN: experiment=E23; headline={n_rules, precision_table, n_passing, criterion_met}.
